summary: Add `podcast produce`: annotated-script podcast orchestration over dialogue, music, SFX, and local ffmpeg mixing.
reason: ElevenLabs has no end-to-end episode mix/master endpoint; producing a finished podcast requires chaining generation endpoints and assembling locally with ducking, transitions, and loudness normalization. This is a hand-authored novel command, not generator output.
validated_outcome: go build ./...; go vet ./...; go test ./...; govulncheck ./...; python3 .github/scripts/verify-skill/verify_skill.py --dir library/ai/elevenlabs/
